note: Curated statements of what WOULD close (or move) each problem, each mapped to the verifier that checks it. Read by the task_packet tool; not a promise of closability. verifier_kind values: frozen vela-verify kinds, 'lean' (math CI), 'python:<script>' (pinned deterministic tier), 'review' (Frontier PR accept).
